scripts.start: pnpm run start:wp && pnpm run start:mailhog
scripts.stop: pnpm run stop:wp && pnpm run stop:mailhog
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:js && pnpm run lint:php
scripts.format: pnpm run format:js && npm run format:php
scripts.phpcbf: wp-env run cli --env-cwd=wp-content bash ./.husky/phpcbf tools plugins/appointments-booking
scripts.initialize: pnpm install && pnpm run start:wp; wp-env run cli --env-cwd=wp-content composer install && pnpm run dump-autoload && wp-env run cli wp plugin activate appointments-booking other-plugin && pnpm run build
scripts.check:wporg: wp-env run cli wp plugin check appointments-booking --slug=appointments-booking --exclude-directories=tests,coverage,playwright-report --exclude-files=.zipignore
scripts.check:wporg:pro: wp-env run cli wp plugin check appointments-booking --slug=appointments-booking --categories=plugin_repo,security,performance,accessibility --include-experimental --exclude-directories=tests,coverage,playwright-report --exclude-files=.zipignore
